# Overachiever2 Release Notes

This file contains one line summaries of commits that are worthy of mentioning in release notes.

**Do not edit this file unless you are performing a release.**

Instead, if you are authoring a PR for the main branch, add your release note to

[NEW_RELEASE_NOTES.md](./NEW_RELEASE_NOTES.md).

## 0.1.4
- Display the same criteriaString in the NPC unit tooltip as the one displayed in the achievement frame.

## 0.1.3
- Unit Tooltip Integration: Instantly see achievement criteria progress directly on unit tooltips.

## 0.1.2
- Remove the `Debug` checkbox from the option.

## 0.1.1
- First release

## 0.1.0
- Initial upload
